final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between 7 AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include all 7 concepts as labeled nodes with connecting lines/arrows showing relationships, definitions embedded near each node
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with brief definitions and relationship connectors:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable background — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, easy-to-understand visual tone — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a clear, readable direction with visual hierarchy — exact colors and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketch texture feel — exact line weight and paper texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept names exactly as written; relationship arrows/lines between related concepts must be visible; each concept must have an accompanying short definition in the infographic
Avoid: dense academic layout; avoid making it look like a formal flowchart or corporate slide
